highlights: Collaborated on a cross-functional platform team, overseeing multiple org contributions and taking ownership of microservices for report creation and presentation.
Reduced former customer data deletion KTLO minutes to 0 by seamlessly integrating into a CI/CD pipeline.
Championed an initiative to entirely deprecate a service afflicted with a significant public data security vulnerability.
Served as the project lead for the development of a streamlined dashboard table of contents, enhancing page navigation efficiency.
Engineered an operations dashboard during an engineering-wide code yellow, significantly improving response times to automated alerts and reducing initial triage time to under 5 minutes.
Spearheaded development of the 'Custom Metrics' feature, enabling users to apply mathematical operations on their survey reports.
Orchestrated international, cross-team collaboration to drive the successful launch and approval of critical features for Qualtrics' 360 Feedback tool.
Significantly optimized operational efficiency by partially automating a time-consuming data deletion process, reducing it to just 15-30 minutes of weekly maintenance.
Offered effective mentorship to two engineers, including one intern, empowering them to work independently and achieve self-sufficiency within just one quarter.
Collaboratively designed a Unity-based VR surgeon simulator as part of a three-member team.
Led the complete software development lifecycle and successfully deployed the project to 35 production Oculus Quest units.
Contributed to a collaborative effort in the development of an online legal tool, providing support to solos and small law firms to level the playing field in legal services.
Instructed algorithm and data structure labs and conducted regular office hours to support students' learning.
